title: Jit Ex
description:
JIT-EX, LLC is a privately owned for-hire trucking fleet based in Memphis and Nashville, specia
lizing in regional and local truckload services, dedicated fleets, and crossdock solutions. The
company offers a variety of services including transloading, dock services, and storage traile
rs, aiming to be a one-stop solution for transportation needs.

We will upload 40gb of corporate data soon. Employee personal docs (passports, DL numbers of 31
7 persons, SSNs, w9s and so on), credit card details, payment details, lot of NDAs, projects, c
ontracts and agreements, customer information, etc.
